notes:
Added:
- Download Video: paste many links at once (one link per line); each is fetched
  independently, so one bad link doesn't sink the batch and failed lines stay in
  the box to retry. Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to fetch.
- Download Video: a YouTube cookies panel (paste Netscape cookies.txt) for
  videos that need sign-in — age-restricted, 'confirm you're not a bot', private
  playlists — with a how-to-get-cookies link. Saved once, applied to every
  fetch/download.

Changed:
- Update check reads a static latest.json from the downloads site first, so it
  no longer trips GitHub's API rate limit (was returning 403); the REST API is
  only a fallback and a 403 now shows 'rate limited, try again in ~N min'.
- The downloads website reads latest.json too, so the per-OS Download buttons
  link directly to the file.

Fixed:
- Landing page: per-OS Download buttons no longer open the GitHub release page
  instead of downloading (they were left un-rewritten when the API was rate-limited).
